prevalence.source: EASL and European hepatology epidemiology syntheses

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate; progression to NASH/cirrhosis in a subset

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Imaging evidence of steatosis plus exclusion of significant alcohol use; fibrosis assessment as needed

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Ultrasound and elastography widely available in many systems
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Weight loss, diet and exercise, control of diabetes and lipids; fibrosis risk management
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong hepatology networks and access to fibrosis assessment
